message:
feat(fastapi): major expansion of extractors, middleware, and health infrastructure

Comprehensive enhancements to the FastAPI-style Rust web framework across
multiple crates, adding production-ready features for request handling,
middleware composition, and application health monitoring.

## Extractors (crates/fastapi-core/src/extract.rs) [+4030/-1296 lines]
- Expanded typed extractor ecosystem with comprehensive validation
- Added multipart form data extraction with streaming support
- Enhanced JSON body extraction with size limits and content-type validation
- Implemented nested extractor composition for complex request parsing
- Added extractor rejection types with detailed error messages and HTTP status codes
- Improved FromRequest/FromRequestParts trait implementations
- Added timeout handling for slow request body consumption

## Middleware (crates/fastapi-core/src/middleware.rs) [+1683 lines]
- Implemented comprehensive middleware stack with ordered execution
- Added request timing middleware with configurable thresholds
- Implemented CORS middleware with preflight handling
- Added compression middleware (gzip, brotli, deflate)
- Implemented security headers middleware (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options)
- Added request ID propagation through entire request lifecycle
- Implemented rate limiting middleware with configurable strategies
- Added authentication middleware hooks for custom auth schemes
- Implemented request/response logging middleware with redaction

## Health Endpoints (crates/fastapi-core/src/health.rs) [NEW]
- Added /health endpoint for load balancer health checks
- Implemented /ready endpoint for Kubernetes readiness probes
- Added /live endpoint for liveness probes
- Implemented dependency health aggregation
- Added configurable health check timeouts

## Benchmarking (crates/fastapi-core/src/bench.rs) [NEW]
- Added microbenchmark utilities for extractor performance testing
- Implemented throughput measurement helpers
- Added memory allocation tracking for request handlers

## Testing Utilities (crates/fastapi-core/src/testing.rs)
- Enhanced TestClient with additional request building methods
- Added response assertion helpers
- Improved mock request context generation

## Output Components
- help_display.rs: CLI help formatting improvements
- openapi_display.rs: OpenAPI spec rendering enhancements
- Integration test updates for app lifecycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -277,7 +277,9 @@ fn test_request_logging_performance() {
                 status: if i % 10 == 0 { 500 } else { 200 },
                 timing: Some(ResponseTiming::new(Duration::from_micros(
                     #[allow(clippy::cast_sign_loss)]
-                    { (i % 100) as u64 * 100 },
+                    {
+                        (i % 100) as u64 * 100
+                    },
                 ))),
                 client_ip: Some("127.0.0.1".to_string()),
                 request_id: None,
